name: javier-batres-site
description: Personal website for Fernando Javier Batres Velásquez (Javier Batres) built with Angular.

@modelcontextprotocol/sdk.reason: compatibility pin inherited from an earlier Angular CLI dependency update; not introduced by the current security remediation
@modelcontextprotocol/sdk.removeWhen: @angular/cli resolves @modelcontextprotocol/sdk >= 1.27.1 without an override, or a clean install proves the override is redundant

@sentry/cli>undici.reason: security temporary pin for GHSA-f269-vfmq-vjvj, GHSA-2mjp-6q6p-2qxm and GHSA-4992-7rv2-5pvq; @sentry/cli@3.3.0 resolves undici 6.23.0 by default
@sentry/cli>undici.removeWhen: @sentry/cli ships with undici >= 6.24.0 and npm audit stays clean without the override

@angular/build>vite.reason: security temporary patch override for GHSA-v2wj-q39q-566r, GHSA-p9ff-h696-f583 and GHSA-4w7w-66w2-5vf9; @angular/build@21.2.6 pins vite 7.3.1, so the project stays on patch-compatible vite 7.3.2 after install and production build validation
@angular/build>vite.removeWhen: @angular/build resolves vite >= 7.3.2 natively and install/build succeed without the override

anymatch>picomatch.reason: security temporary pin for GHSA-c2c7-rcm5-vvqj and GHSA-3v7f-55p6-f55p; chokidar resolves anymatch 3.1.3 which otherwise installs picomatch 2.3.1
anymatch>picomatch.removeWhen: anymatch resolves picomatch >= 2.3.2 without help from overrides

flatted.reason: security temporary pin for GHSA-rf6f-7fwh-wjgh; flat-cache and log4js were resolving flatted 3.3.4
flatted.removeWhen: all transitive consumers resolve flatted >= 3.4.2 without the override

micromatch>picomatch.reason: security temporary pin for GHSA-c2c7-rcm5-vvqj and GHSA-3v7f-55p6-f55p; http-proxy-middleware resolves micromatch 4.0.8 which otherwise installs picomatch 2.3.1
micromatch>picomatch.removeWhen: micromatch resolves picomatch >= 2.3.2 on its own

minimatch@10>brace-expansion.reason: security temporary pin for the brace-expansion npm audit finding; @typescript-eslint/typescript-estree resolves minimatch 10.2.4 which otherwise installs brace-expansion 5.0.4
minimatch@10>brace-expansion.removeWhen: minimatch 10 resolves brace-expansion >= 5.0.5 without an override

minimatch@3>brace-expansion.reason: security temporary pin for the brace-expansion npm audit finding in legacy minimatch chains used by eslint, karma and glob
minimatch@3>brace-expansion.removeWhen: legacy minimatch 3 consumers resolve brace-expansion >= 1.1.13 without an override

readdirp>picomatch.reason: security temporary pin for GHSA-c2c7-rcm5-vvqj and GHSA-3v7f-55p6-f55p; readdirp 3.6.0 otherwise installs picomatch 2.3.1 via chokidar
readdirp>picomatch.removeWhen: readdirp resolves picomatch >= 2.3.2 without an override

router>path-to-regexp.reason: security temporary pin for GHSA-j3q9-mxjg-w52f and GHSA-27v5-c462-wpq7; router 2.2.0 under @modelcontextprotocol/sdk otherwise resolves path-to-regexp 8.3.0
router>path-to-regexp.removeWhen: router resolves path-to-regexp >= 8.4.0 without an override

serialize-javascript.reason: security temporary pin for GHSA-qj8w-gfj5-8c6v / CVE-2026-34043; copy-webpack-plugin 14.0.0 otherwise resolves serialize-javascript 7.0.4
serialize-javascript.removeWhen: copy-webpack-plugin or its dependants resolve serialize-javascript >= 7.0.5 without an override

socket.io-parser.reason: security temporary pin for GHSA-677m-j7p3-52f9; karma test tooling otherwise resolves socket.io-parser 4.2.5
socket.io-parser.removeWhen: socket.io resolves socket.io-parser >= 4.2.6 without an override
